topic: All my houseplants lean toward one empty corner of the room away from the windows
title: All My Houseplants Lean Toward One Empty Corner of the Room | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every houseplant I own leans toward the same empty corner of my living room. Away from every window.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a living room with several houseplants all leaning toward one dim empty corner, soft daylight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Bright apartment. Plants on every sill. I keep them well.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a bright apartment living room with potted plants on every windowsill, daylight, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a potted plant leaning toward a window in the light, dim room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One week they all bent toward the dark corner by the closet.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of houseplants bending toward a dark corner near a closet, away from the windows, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of plants in a sunlit room all angled away from the sun toward shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every stem, every leaf, pointing at that one spot.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of plant stems and leaves all pointing at one corner of a room, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of hands turning a potted plant around on a sill, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning they had bent back toward the corner.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a potted plant bent back toward a dark corner by morning, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The plants nearest the corner are dying. The far ones strain so hard the stems snap.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wilting plant near a dark corner and a strained snapped stem on another, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I sat in that corner in the dark. Every plant turned to face me.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person sitting in a dark room corner while every plant faces toward them, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I gave the plants away. The corner stays cold.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty living room corner, cold and bare, no plants, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My new neighbor says her plants have started leaning. Through the shared wall. Toward me.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a potted plant leaning toward a shared apartment wall, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
